criteria.label: Run pytest with branch coverage and read `term-missing` output.
criteria.example: `pytest --cov=ragapp --cov-branch --cov-report=term-missing` — read the Missing column to find untested lines/branches.

criteria.label: Generate and read the HTML heatmap to find genuine gaps.
criteria.example: `pytest --cov-report=html && open htmlcov/index.html` — focus on red lines in critical modules.

criteria.label: Add diff-coverage to the PR pipeline to gate new code, not legacy code.
Set per-module coverage thresholds aligned to risk (90%+ critical, 60-70% glue).
criteria.example: Per-package `fail_under` or a CI script enforcing per-path floors.

criteria.label: Run mutation testing on the most critical modules and act on surviving mutants.
criteria.example: `mutmut run --paths-to-mutate=src/ragapp/retry.py` — fix asserts that fail to catch mutations.
